summary: Tested all LP-UI-REACH-GAPS category breakdown features. All 13 test cases passed across GO, NO-GO, and WAIT results. CategoryBreakdown component renders correctly with 5 cards (R/E/A/C/H), correct scores, color-coded borders, and result-specific CTAs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All REACH category breakdown features verified. GO: all 5 cards 9/9 or 6/6 with green ✓, italic muted pass feedback, Begin Ground 0 only CTA. NO-GO: all critical cards with red ✗, R=3/9 with financial constraints feedback, H=2/6 (6-point scale), Review Ground 0 Materials + Contact CTAs. WAIT: mixed pass/warning/critical cards, all 3 CTAs (Begin Ground 0, Retake Assessment, Contact), What This Means shows flagged category names. CategoryBreakdown renders before RiskMap. Color-coded borders: green/amber/red. data-testids: category-breakdown, gap-card-r/e/a/c/h, cta-begin-ground-0, cta-retake, cta-contact.

test_results.wait_mixed_pass_warning_critical_cards: PASS - R=9/9 pass, E=9/9 pass, A=5/9 warning, C=3/9 critical, H=2/6 critical
test_results.wait_what_this_means_shows_flagged_categ: PASS - Authority readiness, Commitment, Operational discipline shown
